channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace

item.title: gouse - Thu Mar 05 15:29:33 UTC 2026
item.description:
gouse toggles declared and not used errors in Go. Toggle ‘declared and not used’ errors in Go by using idiomatic _ = notUsedVar and leaving a TODO comment. Quick...

item.description:
